title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.273 - Duties of division
text:
324.273.  Duties of division. — The division shall:
  (1)  Employ, within the funds appropriated, such employees as are necessary to carry out the provisions of sections 324.240 to 324.275; and
  (2)  Exercise all budgeting, purchasing, reporting and other related management functions.
(L. 1999 H.B. 343 merged with S.B. 362)
